query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS customerId,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-09-09 14:05:16' AND o.shippedAt <= '2026-03-08 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6m,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-03-08 14:05:16' AND o.shippedAt < '2025-09-09 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6to12m
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON (
  (o.customerId = c.id OR o.customerExternalId = c.externalId)
  AND o.orderStatus != -1
  AND o.isShipped = 1
  AND o.shippedAt IS NOT NULL
)
GROUP BY c.id
LIMIT 5;
command:

  c.id AS customerId,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-09-09 14:05:16' AND o.shippedAt <= '2026-03-08 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6m,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shippedAt >= '2025-03-08 14:05:16' AND o.shippedAt < '2025-09-09 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6to12m
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON (
  (o.customerId = c.id OR o.customerExternalId = c.externalId)
  AND o.orderStatus != -1
  AND o.isShipped = 1
  AND o.shippedAt IS NOT NULL
)
GROUP BY c.id
LIMIT 5;
